name: Typing Speed Test (WPM)
seo_description: Use our free typing speed (wpm) to quickly estimate wpm, net_wpm based on words, minutes, errors. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate WPM: 200 chars in 1 minute with 2 errors.
formula_display: WPM = Palabras / minutes; WPM net = (Palabras-errors) / minutes
mistakes: No Subtract errors to WPM net
Contar caracteres in lugar of palabras
desc: Free online typing speed (wpm). Enter words and minutes to get instant results.
